mnemonics: UNFOLD - Understand Neural Frameworks Daily Long-term
keyPoints: Unfolding Computational Graphs: The process of transforming a graph into a linear sequence of nodes.
Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs): A type of neural network that can maintain a hidden state over time.
Bidirectional RNNs: A type of RNN that processes input in both forward and backward directions.
Deep Recurrent Neural Networks: A type of RNN that uses multiple layers to learn complex patterns.
Recursive Neural Networks: A type of neural network that uses recursion to process input.
The Long Short-Term (LSTM): A type of RNN that is designed to learn long-term dependencies in data.
